prjc_builder_desc: Complete the remaining steps, then claim your Builder role.
prjc_validator_desc: Complete the application to enter the validator waitlist.

prjc_waitlist_desc: You're on the waitlist. Check your validator status while graduation is reviewed.
bj_welcome_message_ready: Your Builder role is ready to claim. The remaining setup steps are optional, but they will help you ship faster once you are in.
bj_welcome_message_start: Start with your GitHub account and the boilerplate repo. The journey will guide you through each setup step from here.
bj_hero_description: Connect GitHub and star the boilerplate repo to claim the Builder role. Adding networks, getting testnet GEN, and deploying are recommended next steps, not requirements. Only the GitHub link and repo star award BP.
bj_hero_helper_ready: Ready to claim. The remaining steps are recommended, not required.
bj_hero_helper_start: Connect GitHub and star the boilerplate repo to unlock the Builder role. The other steps are recommended.
bj_github_detail_link: Link GitHub to verify builder tasks
bj_github_panel_copy: Link the GitHub account you will use to star the boilerplate repository. This step awards 25 BP once the link is verified.
bj_star_panel_copy: Open the repository, star it with your linked GitHub account, then verify the task here.
bj_networks_panel_copy: Add Bradbury, Asimov, and Studio to this wallet. The journey continues when all three network entries have been confirmed.
bj_topup_panel_copy: Use the faucet, then check the wallet balance to continue. The journey advances once Testnet GEN is detected.
bj_deploy_detail_prompt: Deploy an intelligent contract in Studio
bj_deploy_panel_copy: Deploy from Studio with this wallet, then verify the deployment. Once verified, the Claim Builder Role button above becomes available.
bj_completion_title: Ready to claim the Builder role
bj_completion_subtitle: The remaining steps are recommended, not required.
bj_unlock_contributions_body: Pick up open missions and ship for the ecosystem.
bj_unlock_leaderboard_body: Climb the ranks and get seen by the whole ecosystem.
bj_unlock_resources_body: Templates, deep guides, and direct core-team support.
bj_toast_start_error: Could not start your builder journey. Try refreshing in a moment.
bj_error_star_task_unavailable: The boilerplate star task is not available yet.
bj_error_load_task: Could not load the builder task. Try refreshing in a moment.
bj_network_add_failed: Failed to add {network}. Please try manually.
bj_toast_balance_check_failed: Could not check your Testnet GEN balance.
bj_toast_github_claim_failed: Could not claim GitHub BP yet.
bj_toast_complete_failed: Could not complete the builder journey yet.
cj_welcome_message_complete: Your community steps are complete. Finish the journey to unlock the Creator role and start submitting community work.
cj_welcome_message_start: Connect your social accounts, verify the community actions, and post your referral code to unlock the Creator role.
cj_hero_description: Link your social accounts, verify the GenLayer creator actions, and share your unique X post before claiming the Creator role.
cj_x_detail_connect: Connect X to verify community actions
cj_link_x_panel_copy: Link the X account you will use to follow GenLayer and publish your community verification post.
cj_discord_detail_connect: Connect Discord to verify server membership
cj_link_discord_panel_copy: Link the Discord account you will use in the GenLayer community server.
cj_follow_x_panel_copy: Follow @genlayer with your linked X account, then verify the task.
cj_join_discord_panel_copy: Join the GenLayer Discord with your linked Discord account, then verify the task.
cj_x_post_panel_copy: Choose one post, publish it from your linked X account, then paste the public post URL to verify it.
cj_unlock_missions_body: Pick up open missions across the ecosystem and ship with the community.
cj_unlock_leaderboard_body: Climb the community ranks and get noticed by the ecosystem.
cj_unlock_rewards_body: Redeem your GenLayer Points for ecosystem rewards.

bl_cta_hint_unauthenticated: Connect to unlock builder tasks, points, and your first contribution.
bl_cta_hint_authenticated: Start your builder journey: GitHub, boilerplate star, first contribution.
bl_feature_web_body: Read APIs, websites, and live events directly during contract execution.
bl_feature_language_body: Write rules in plain language and let validators evaluate the meaning.
bl_feature_resolution_body: Resolve outcomes that require judgment, evidence, and context.
bl_feature_finality_body: Settle disputes in minutes with on-chain finality for agent workflows.
bl_stat_team_label: Access to the builders of GenLayer
bl_hero_description: Smart contracts execute. Intelligent Contracts reason: they read the web, understand natural language, and resolve disputes no if/else ever could.
bl_video_description: A short look at the portal path from first action to intelligent contract launch.
bl_capabilities_line1: What you can build here that
bl_category_description: Performance-based contracts, agent marketplaces, prediction markets, parametric insurance, autonomous finance: every vertical on GenLayer is unclaimed territory. The builders shipping today are defining the category, not competing in it.
bl_earn_description: Earn up to 20% of the fees from every transaction your project generates, and win GenLayer Points for all your daily actions. On GenLayer, your app is a revenue stream from day one.
bl_earn_stat_label: Of transaction fees, back to you
vl_hero_description: GenLayer validators run LLM-backed nodes that inspect web data, evaluate evidence, and commit accepted judgments on-chain.
vl_cta_hint: A selected validator proposes an answer, others verify it, and appeals resolve disagreements before finality.
vl_video_description: Watch the flow for reasoning, verification, and finality before joining the validator path.
vl_comparison_title: From Passive Infrastructure to Active Judgment
vl_card_traditional_body: Passive infrastructure with capped single-digit yields.
vl_card_genlayer_body: Run an LLM-backed validator, evaluate evidence through Optimistic Democracy, and finalize accepted outcomes on-chain.
vl_economics_title: Higher Fees Per Transaction Than Anywhere Else
vl_economics_item1: Paid per decision, with each decision recorded through 15+ on-chain transactions.
vl_economics_item2: On mainnet, the same activity profile would already rank GenLayer Top-15 among all chains by daily fees.
vl_workflow_description: A proposer produces a judgment with an LLM-backed validator. Other validators verify independently, and appeals settle disagreements before the result is finalized on-chain.
vl_final_description: Join the validator path and prepare to resolve the agentic economy.
cl_cta_hint_unauthenticated: Connect to start your creator journey, contributions, and points.
cl_cta_hint_authenticated: Start contributing across tasks, content, testing, and ecosystem growth.
cl_card_protocol_body: Try live flows, test project behavior, and help harden the network before mainnet.
cl_card_bugs_body: Catch edge cases, report issues, and turn product feedback into contribution credit.
cl_card_content_body: Explain agentic commerce, teach new users, and expand GenLayer's reach.
cl_card_ecosystem_body: Bring builders, validators, and contributors into the network from day one.
cl_points_onchain_body: Test projects and act across the ecosystem as the network comes online.
cl_points_social_body: Take the project beyond its borders with content, distribution, and community action.
cl_points_passport_body: Your passport records verified contributions across tasks, content, and ecosystem work.
cl_hero_line2: Building the Adjudication Layer for Agentic Commerce.
cl_hero_description: Join the creators pushing the adjudication layer for agentic commerce and get rewarded for every contribution.
cl_video_description: See how community actions, tasks, and verified work show up inside the Portal.
cl_points_title: Join the Community, Then Earn Through Tasks
cl_points_description: Complete the community journey to activate your Portal Passport. From there, verified tasks earn GenLayer Points tied to the work you did.
cl_why_title: The next revolution of the internet is being built.
cl_why_description: Early contributors are shaping agentic commerce, reputation, and dispute resolution before mainnet arrives.
guard_role_desc_builder: Ship Intelligent Contracts and ecosystem projects.
guard_role_desc_validator: Run infrastructure and adjudicate protocol decisions.
guard_role_desc_community: Create content, test flows, and expand the network.

arl_title_builder: Build the first contracts that can think.
arl_body_builder: Start with the boilerplate, make your first contribution, and claim your early Builder role.
arl_body_validator: Join the validator path, enter the waitlist, and prepare to adjudicate real Intelligent Contract decisions.
arl_waitlist_body_validator: Your validator waitlist spot is active. Graduation unlocks the next step.
arl_body_community: Start your creator path, link your channels, and turn ecosystem action into a visible GenLayer record.
arl_contact_title: Need to speak with the validator team?
arl_contact_body: If you operate validator infrastructure or need to share operator details, contact the team with your wallet, organization, and relevant node experience.
rlv_default_description: Watch the network experience before starting your journey.
rl_error_start_journey: Could not start this journey. Please try again.
wh_subtitle_logged_in: Continue earning points and climbing the leaderboard.
wh_subtitle_logged_out: Join professional validators and builders in testing the trust infrastructure for the AI age.
ljs_description: GenLayer is built by its ecosystem. Whether you code, run infrastructure, or create content — your contributions move GenLayer forward and are rewarded accordingly.
ljs_bullet_builder: Sign up as a Builder and deploy your first Intelligent Contract
ljs_bullet_validator: Join the Validator waitlist and help secure the network
ljs_bullet_community: Join the Community to create content and participate in events
rc_subheader_logged_in: Keep earning points across all your roles.
rc_subheader_logged_out: Pick your path — you can always take on more roles later.
rc_builder_description: Deploy Intelligent Contracts, ship projects, and earn GenLayer Points for every accepted contribution.
rc_builder_description_logged_in: Submit your work and earn points for accepted contributions.
rc_validator_description: Join the waitlist, run nodes on the testnet, and earn GenLayer Points for uptime and infrastructure.
rc_validator_description_logged_in: Check your validator waitlist status and node requirements.
rc_community_description: Create content, participate in events, and grow the GenLayer ecosystem to earn GenLayer Points.
rc_community_description_logged_in: Engage with the GenLayer community and earn community points.
ss_description: Every contribution is reviewed by stewards. Accepted work earns GenLayer Points. Quality matters, the 18.5% acceptance rate means your work stands out.
ss_bullet_validate: Validate subjective outcomes in Intelligent Contracts
crs_description: Earn points with every accepted contribution and rise through the leaderboard. Top contributors get recognized and earn exclusive rewards.
crs_bullet_points_soon: GenLayer Points coming soon — unifying all roles
crs_bullet_unlocks: Badges and roles unlock as you progress
ops_builder_description: Ship Intelligent Contracts. Earn up to 20% of the points they generate.
ops_validator_description: Run a node that reasons. Get paid per decision.
ops_community_description: Push the project forward. Earn GenLayer Points.
ctab_rank_keep_earning: Keep earning points to climb the ranks
ctab_subtitle_logged_in: Invite other builders to GenLayer and receive 10% of the points they make, forever.
ctab_subtitle_logged_out: Join professional validators and builders in creating the trust infrastructure for the AI age.
